title: 7 Returning EDC Funds
body_text:
7	Returning EDC Funds
7.1	Process for Returning EDC Funds
Funding that has been received from Export Development Canada (EDC) may need to be returned for various reasons, such as:
Duplicate payments received
Business customer changed their mind
Financial institutions and Export Development Canada (EDC) are responsible for detecting duplicate applications for the same CRA business number. If EDC detects a duplication, they will notify Central 1, and Central 1 will notify your financial institution.
If your financial institution needs to return funds, log in to ServiceNow and create a new ticket. See Figure 1.
Note:	For same-day processing of returned funds, this ticket must be submitted to Central 1 before 12 pm PT / 3 pm ET. Tickets received after this time will be processed the next business day.
Figure 1: Create a New Ticket in ServiceNow
Complete the new ticket as shown in Figure 2:
